runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (31.77) when sixth over 530m at this track in a Grade 6. Starts from box 1 for the first time here. Looks well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (31.77) when sixth over 530m at this track in a Grade 6. Starts from box 1 for the first time here. Looks well placed and should feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked first turn; Checked turn into back straight.

runners.formComment: Won her last two including a good win last start over 512m at Mt Gambier by one length in a Grade 3/4/5. That last win was in the quickest time on the card. Stick with her.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won her last two including a good win last start over 512m at Mt Gambier by one length in a Grade 3/4/5. That last win was in the quickest time on the card. Stick with her.

runners.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd over 530m at this track beaten 2.25 lengths (30.86) behind Victa Wally in a Grade 6 on April 9. Thereabouts at her last couple and is capable of better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd over 530m at this track beaten 2.25 lengths (30.86) behind Victa Wally in a Grade 6 on April 9. Thereabouts at her last couple and is capable of better.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 342m in 19.74. Followed that up with a minor placing over 400m at Gawler at Other four days ago. Hard to have without further improvement.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 342m in 19.74. Followed that up with a minor placing over 400m at Gawler at Other four days ago. Hard to have without further improvement.

runners.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 530m (30.99) beating Scott Scotch in Maiden on April 9. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 530m (30.99) beating Scott Scotch in Maiden on April 9. Shouldn't trouble the top few hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled out of boxes; Checked turn off back straight.

runners.formComment: Finished second last start (38.12) over 643m at Gawler. Prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second last start (38.12) over 643m at Gawler. Prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turn into home straight first occasion.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.5 lengths over 512m at Mt Gambier in a handy (29.68), beating City Of Love. Will find this a bit tougher, tempted to look elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 1.5 lengths over 512m at Mt Gambier in a handy (29.68), beating City Of Love. Will find this a bit tougher, tempted to look elsewhere.

runners.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 5 lengths over 531m at Gawler in a handy 30.62, beating Referent Power. Can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 5 lengths over 531m at Gawler in a handy 30.62, beating Referent Power. Can measure up again.

runners.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a one length fourth (30.94) over 530m at this track. Should be around the mark.

formComments.comment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a one length fourth (30.94) over 530m at this track. Should be around the mark.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 12 over 531m at Gawler behind Rhinestone beaten 5.5 lengths (31.14). Has claims if at her best.
